ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bike_rentals" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental transaction */,
  "dteday" TEXT /* Date of the rental */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season of the year (1: winter, 2: spring, 3: summer, 4: fall) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the rental */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the rental (1-12) */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the rental (0-23) */,
  "holiday" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the day is a holiday */,
  "weekday" INTEGER /* Day of the week (0: Sunday, 1: Monday, ..., 6: Saturday) */,
  "working_day" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the day is a working day */,
  "weather_situation" INTEGER /* Weather situation (1: clear, 2: mist, etc.) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in Celsius */,
  "apparent_temperature" REAL /* Apparent temperature in Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity percentage */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Windspeed in m/s */,
  "casual_users" INTEGER /* Number of casual users who rented bikes */,
  "registered_users" INTEGER /* Number of registered users who rented bikes */,
  "total_count" INTEGER /* Total number of rentals (casual + registered) */,
  "rental_duration" REAL /* Duration of the rental in hours */,
  "rental_distance" REAL /* Distance traveled during the rental in kilometers */,
  "bike_type" TEXT /* Type of bike rented (e.g., mountain, road, hybrid) */,
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the start station */,
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the end station */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_weather_situation FOREIGN KEY ("weather_situation") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition (e.g., Clear, Misty) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "registration_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is registered (true) or casual (false) */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., casual, registered) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user (e.g., male, female, other) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasonal_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend analysis */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season of the year (1: winter, 2: spring, 3: summer, 4: fall) */,
  "average_rentals" REAL /* Average number of rentals in that season */,
  "peak_day" TEXT /* Day of the week with the highest rentals */,
  "peak_hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day with the highest rentals */,
  " Moving_Avg_rental_count" REAL /* Moving average rental count over a specific time period */,
  "moving_avg_temperature" REAL /* Moving average temperature over a specific time period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "holiday_name" TEXT /* Name of the holiday */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of holiday (e.g., national, regional, cultural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the station (i.e., number of bikes it can hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_info" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of bike (e.g., mountain, road, hybrid) */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the bike (e.g., good, fair, poor) */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the bike was purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rental_bikes" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the bike rented */,
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the start station */,
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the end station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_bikes_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_bikes_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_bikes_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bike_info ("bike_id")
)
